summary: Completed e2e testing of Suits India Content Management System. All core features working correctly - admin login, Content Editor, dynamic content on public pages, and API endpoints.

ui_bugs.issue: Email placeholder showed old 'admin@tailorstailor.com' branding - FIXED by testing agent

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Admin login at /admin/login with credentials admin@suitsindia.com/admin123, 2) Content Editor at /admin/content with inline editing and Save All Changes button, 3) Public pages (/, /contact-us) display dynamic content from /api/settings/all-content API, 4) Footer shows correct phone (+91 9446373329) and email (aju@suitsindia.in), 5) All content shows 'Suits India' branding with no old 'Tailors Tailor' references

admin_login.details: Login with admin@suitsindia.com / admin123 works correctly, redirects to /admin/dashboard

content_editor.details: Content Editor page loads at /admin/content with tabs for all pages (Home, About, Garments, Fabrics, Technology, How It Works, Get Started, Trunk Show, Contact Us), Save All Changes button visible

contact_us_page.details: Shows dynamic content from API - 'Suits India' branding, correct phone (+91 9446373329), correct email (aju@suitsindia.in), company name 'Suits India Private Ltd.'

home_page.details: Loads correctly with dynamic content, 'Why Suits India ?' section visible

footer.details: Shows correct phone, email, and '© 2025 Suits India. All rights reserved.' copyright

api_all_content.details: GET /api/settings/all-content returns saved content with Suits India branding
